description: Lock the 2026-06-27 correction of mechanized_laundry to early commercial electric washing machines, not all steam laundries, dry cleaning, later automatic washers, or regulated laundry workplaces.

checks.reason: The date stays anchored to the Thor/Hurley electric washer context.
The source-backed scoped mechanism uses a small electric motor to drive the washing cylinder and reversing gear.
Soap and alkaline washing agents are a laundry-process lineage, not a direct mechanical component.
The broad early-appliance category should not replace the more direct electric_motor component edge.
Industrial safety regulation is later workplace/deployment context, not a prerequisite for the first electric washer mechanism.
